exit_criteria: TASK-075 acceptance reflects validated UI knowledge docs.
Implementation scope is bounded to Control Room web UI and smoke coverage.
Implementation loop starts from this planning build and task evidence.

loop_start.reason: Planning consumes validated documentation build and should not rely on feedback chat.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation and task-close validation must be independent of builder context with clean SHA evidence when closing.

next_loop.reason: Implementation should consume planning build/task/docs rather than chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Replace rail/inspector/footer shell with header navigation, workspace, inline details, and settings overlay.
Expose KB as a top-level view with Product/System drilldown; Product defaults to Stories and UI surfaces.
Rename Graph UI to Map and make doc/KB relationships the default scope.
Rename Claims user-facing language to Sessions and show active-session coordination before claim internals.
Present Settings as repo-backed preferences with categories and advanced source detail rather than path-map rows.
Keep Board as retro terminal Kanban and make System diagram labels/arrows readable with inline detail cards.

evidence_mapping.criterion: TASK-075 acceptance maps validated docs to code/test scope.
evidence_mapping.evidence: TASK-075 patched with acceptance for header nav, KB drilldown, Map/Sessions, settings preferences, inline detail, Board, System, and secondary-screen boundary.

summary: Plan TASK-075 implementation of ASCII-like CodeWiki UI redesign after validated docs.
task_changes: TASK-075 refined from prior value-first UI verify work back to implementation for accepted ASCII-like UI redesign.
roadmap_changes: TASK-075 refined from prior value-first UI verify work back to implementation for accepted ASCII-like UI redesign.
tdd_plan: Update smoke test fixture and assertions to require header nav labels Status/KB/Board/Map/Sessions and reject persistent rail/inspector/footer/statusline markup.
Add/adjust smoke assertions for JS strings: KB drilldown, Product KB Stories/UI Surfaces, System KB, Map doc relationships, Sessions, repo-backed Settings preferences, inline detail cards.
Add model assertions for Product categories ordering and new Sessions state model if implemented.
Run node tests/smoke/control-room.test.mjs before and after code changes, then npm run typecheck.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: TASK-075 acceptance maps validated docs to code/test scope.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: TASK-075 patched with acceptance for header nav, KB drilldown, Map/Sessions, settings preferences, inline detail, Board, System, and secondary-screen boundary.

assumptions: Implementation can keep exported ControlRoom* TypeScript names for compatibility while changing user-facing strings to CodeWiki/KB/Map/Sessions.
Existing Cytoscape Map renderer can be reused, but default scope/query should prioritize doc/KB relationships.
open_questions: Which Settings rows become editable first is deferred; first implementation can stay read-only.
Whether Map includes task/build evidence in default doc scope can be implemented as documentation-first with work/current slices as secondary controls.
risks: Implementation validation/task-close may block if repository cannot provide clean worktree and checked SHA evidence.
